description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, streamlined design. The headband and ear cups are primarily white, with subtle blue accent lines running along the edges. Each ear cup features a prominent black circular panel with a blue LED star pattern, suggesting a decorative or possibly functional display. The ear pads appear cushioned and gray, providing comfort for extended use. The overall construction looks robust, likely made from plastic with soft padding for the ears. The headphones are wireless, as there are no visible cables or connectors.
description: White over-ear headphones with blue accent lines and a blue LED star display on each ear cup. Cushioned gray ear pads and a modern, wireless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the left ear cup with a blue LED star on a black panel and the white headband.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both ear cups, the full arch of the headband, and the symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the right ear cup with a blue LED star and the headband's curve.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the ear cups and headband from the other side.
